site.name: Wing Yee AI Lab
site.tagline: Bringing practical AI into everyday healthcare.

thinking.title: Observe
thinking.body: Identify real healthcare workflow pain points.

thinking.title: Understand
thinking.body: Map patient, clinician, and operational needs.

thinking.title: Build
thinking.body: Prototype usable tools, workflows, and demos.

thinking.title: Improve
thinking.body: Iterate through feedback and real-world context.

impactAreas.title: Patient Experience
impactAreas.description: Using immersive and creative technology to improve healthcare communication, education, and emotional experience.

projects.name: Projection Mapping
projects.value: Immersive visual experience for patient education, relaxation and presentation.
projects.outcome: Replaces flat presentations with spatial storytelling.

projects.name: AI Music & Video
projects.value: AI-generated media for patient engagement, education and storytelling.
projects.outcome: Makes healthcare messages easier to feel and remember.

projects.name: Immersive Web Prototype
projects.value: A responsive 3D scrollytelling experiment for healthcare communication.
projects.outcome: Turns complex ideas into spatial product stories.

projects.name: Yoga Room / Patient Relaxation Visual Experience
projects.value: A future immersive relaxation layer for patient comfort.

impactAreas.title: Clinical Workflow
impactAreas.description: Using AI and digital tools to reduce repetitive clinical workload and improve ward efficiency.

projects.name: Roster Automation
projects.value: AI-assisted roster generation for fairness, usability and planning efficiency.
projects.outcome: Reduces repeated planning work for clinical teams.

projects.name: Smart Ward Reception
projects.value: A tablet-based inquiry system that identifies visitor needs earlier.
projects.outcome: Reduces unnecessary interruptions to clinical staff.

projects.name: AI Feedback Assistant
projects.value: Classifies feedback, drafts replies and keeps human approval before sending.
projects.outcome: Makes feedback handling faster and more consistent.

projects.name: Nursing Workflow Assistant
projects.value: A future AI assistant for repeated clinical information and coordination tasks.
projects.outcome: Supports ward efficiency without adding complexity.

impactAreas.title: Healthcare Intelligence
impactAreas.description: Using AI agents and automation to improve knowledge flow, decision support, and operational awareness.

projects.name: Hermes AI Agent
projects.value: A daily AI intelligence pipeline that summarizes fast-changing AI updates.
projects.outcome: Keeps knowledge flow current without manual tracking.

projects.name: n8n Workflow
projects.value: Backend workflow automation for repetitive administrative processes.
projects.outcome: Connects routine signals to repeatable actions.

projects.name: Multimodal Agent
projects.value: Exploring agents that understand text, image, voice and context.
projects.outcome: Prepares richer clinical and educational workflows.

projects.name: Multi-agent Healthcare Workflow
projects.value: Exploring coordinated agents for clinical, operational and educational tasks.
projects.outcome: Connects separate healthcare tasks into one support system.
